---
title: "Somatic germline paper figures"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
    code_folding: hide
  pdf_document: default
date: "2026-02-05"
---

# Aim
Generate all manuscript figures in order of appearance, followed by supplementary figures.

Note: `Scripts/ACMG_and_LRs/Auto_ACMG_RASopathy_results_analysis.Rmd`
must be knitted first to export the data file read below.

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(caret)
library(forcats)
library(ggtext)
library(ggnewscale)
library(patchwork)
library(ggrepel)
library(cowplot)
library(janitor)
library(UpSetR)

source("gene_panel_functions_for_manuscript_figures.R")

theme_set(theme_bw(14))

safe_colorblind_palette <- c("#88CCEE", "#CC6677", "#117733", "#DDCC77",  "#332288", "#AA4499",
                             "#44AA99", "#999933", "#882255", "#661100", "#6699CC", "#888888")

acmg_colours <- c(
  "Likely benign"     = "#88CCEE",
  "Benign"            = "#6699CC",
  "VUS"               = "#DDCC77",
  "Likely pathogenic" = "#CC6677",
  "Pathogenic"        = "#993333"
)

recode_data_name <- function(x) {
  dplyr::case_match(x,
    "clinvar_long_uncontaminated" ~ "clinvar_count_weighted",
    "DNM_long_uncontaminated"     ~ "DNM_count_weighted",
    "clinvar_long"                ~ "clinvar_count_weighted",
    "DNM_long"                    ~ "DNM_count_weighted",
    .default = x
  )
}
```

```{r}
date <- "240426"

dir.create("../../Data/Figures/Final/Supplement", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("../../Data/Figures/Final",            recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("../../Data/Figures",                  recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
############# Load full data ##############

Clinvar_vs_Biobank <- read_csv("../../Data/ML_model_input/Gene_group_models/Clinvar_vs_Biobank_unique_set1_240426.csv.gz")
DNM_vs_Biobank     <- read_csv("../../Data/ML_model_input/Gene_group_models/DNM_vs_Biobank_unique_set1_240426.csv.gz")
tmp_clinvar        <- read_tsv("../../Data/Variant_lists/Clinvar_DDG2P_missense_path_annot_240426_public.tsv.gz")
```

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
############ Load gene sets ###############

altfunc        <- read_csv("../../Data/Gene_definitions/DDG2P_2025_dominant_selection_genes_AltFunc.csv") %>% pull(gene_symbol)
altfunc_stringent <- read_csv("../../Data/Gene_definitions/DDG2P_2025_dominant_selection_genes_AltFunc_stringent.csv") %>% pull(gene_symbol)
lof            <- read_csv("../../Data/Gene_definitions/DDG2P_2025_dominant_selection_genes_LOF.csv") %>% pull(gene_symbol)
other          <- read_csv("../../Data/Gene_definitions/DDG2P_2025_dominant_selection_genes_other.csv") %>% pull(gene_symbol)
RASopathies    <- read_csv("../../Data/Gene_definitions/RASopathy_genes_VCEP_030425.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>% pull(gene)
altfunc_minus_RAS <- setdiff(altfunc, RASopathies)
macrocephaly   <- read_csv("../../Data/Gene_definitions/Macrocephaly_monoallelic_DD_somatic_genes.csv") %>% pull(gene)
```

```{r, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
############# Load gene group results ###############

AUCs_individual_features <- read_csv(paste0("../../Data/AUC_tables/Gene_group_models/AUC_table_gene_groups_single_features_", date, ".csv")) %>%
  mutate(data_name = recode_data_name(data_name))

AUCs_LR_model <- read_csv(paste0("../../Data/AUC_tables/Gene_group_models/AUC_table_gene_groups_LR_models_", date, ".csv")) %>%
  mutate(Predictor = paste0(cep, "_LR_model_", test_or_train, "_data"),
         data_name = recode_data_name(data_name))

AUCs <- bind_rows(AUCs_LR_model, AUCs_individual_features) %>%
  dplyr::select(Predictor, data_name, gene_group,
                AUC_full, AUC_full_lower, AUC_full_upper, everything()) %>%
  dplyr::select(-any_of("gene_set"))

n_genes <- read_csv(paste0("../../Data/AUC_tables/Gene_group_models/Gene_counts_per_group_", date, ".csv")) %>%
  mutate(data_name = recode_data_name(data_name))
n_vars  <- read_csv(paste0("../../Data/AUC_tables/Gene_group_models/Variant_counts_per_group_", date, ".csv")) %>%
  mutate(data_name = recode_data_name(data_name))

```

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
############# Load single gene results ###############

gene_AUCs_individual_features <- read_csv("../../Data/AUC_tables/Gene_group_hold_out_models/Single_feature_AUCs_individual_genes_240426.csv") %>%
  mutate(dataset = recode_data_name(dataset))
gene_AUCs_LR_model            <- read_csv("../../Data/AUC_tables/Gene_group_hold_out_models/AUC_table_gene_holdout_LR_models_240426.csv") %>%
  mutate(dataset = recode_data_name(dataset))
n_vars_per_gene               <- read_csv("../../Data/AUC_tables/Gene_group_hold_out_models/Variant_counts_per_gene_240426.csv")

n_vars_per_gene_clinvar <- n_vars_per_gene %>%
  filter(data_set %in% c("clinvar_mutation_data_unique", "clinvar_mutation_data_long")) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = data_set, values_from = c(n_path_variants, n_benign_variants)) %>%
  dplyr::select(-n_benign_variants_clinvar_mutation_data_long) %>%
  dplyr::rename(n_benign             = n_benign_variants_clinvar_mutation_data_unique,
                n_unique_pathogenic  = n_path_variants_clinvar_mutation_data_unique,
                n_pathogenic         = n_path_variants_clinvar_mutation_data_long)
```

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
############# Load LRs ###############

LR <- read_csv("../../Data/LR_calculations/LR_table.csv")
```

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
############# Load gene visualisation data (Figures 1 and 3b) ##############

clinvar_vis     <- read_tsv("../../Data/Gene_vis/Clinvar_path_DDG2P_codingcsq_for_gene_vis.tsv.gz")
COSMIC_vis      <- read_tsv("../../Data/Gene_vis/COSMIC_DDG2P_for_gene_vis.tsv.gz")
DNMs_vis        <- read_tsv("../../Data/Gene_vis/DNM_list_for_gene_vis.tsv.gz")
sperm_vis       <- read_tsv("../../Data/Gene_vis/Sperm_seq_for_gene_vis_TwinsUK_only_190126.tsv.gz",
                            show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(codon    = as.integer(stringr::str_extract(amino_acid_change, "^[0-9]+")),
         missense = if_else(Consequence == "missense", "missense", "non_missense"))
buccal_vis      <- read_tsv("../../Data/Gene_vis/Buccal_data_for_gene_visualisation_240426.tsv.gz")
PTPN11_MAVE_vis <- read_csv("../../Data/MAVE/PTPN11_MAVE_Jiang_2025/PTPN11_MAVE_SHP2_FL_41467_2025_60641_MOESM8_ESM.csv") %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  dplyr::select(wt, pos, mut, enrichment_ave)

PTPN11_AM_vis <- read_tsv("../../Data/Alpha_missense/AlphaMissense_hg38_PTPN11.tsv",
                           show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  rename(CHROM = 1) %>%
  transmute(
    codon  = as.integer(stringr::str_extract(protein_variant, "[0-9]+")),
    alt_aa = stringr::str_extract(protein_variant, "[A-Za-z*]$"),
    alt_aa = if_else(alt_aa == "*", "stop", alt_aa),
    am_pathogenicity
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(codon))
```

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
############# Load MAVE benchmarking data (Figure 3a) ##############

PTPN11_dat <- read_csv("../../Data/MAVE_benchmarking/PTPN11_MAVE_plot_dat_unique_long_public_data.csv")
PTEN_MAVE  <- read_csv("../../Data/MAVE_benchmarking/PTEN_MAVE_plot_data_clinvar_long_published_data.csv")
DDX3X_MAVE <- read_csv("../../Data/MAVE_benchmarking/DDX3X_MAVE_plot_data_clinvar_long_published_data.csv")
HRAS_MAVE  <- read_csv("../../Data/MAVE_benchmarking/HRAS_MAVE_plot_data_clinvar_long_published_data.csv")
```

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
############# Load data for Figure 5b and Supplementary Figure S1 ##############

acmg_combined <- read_csv("../../Data/auto_ACMG_output/ACMG_all_classes_before_after_somatic.csv",
                           show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    acmg_class = factor(acmg_class,
                        levels = c("Benign", "Likely benign", "VUS",
                                   "Likely pathogenic", "Pathogenic")),
    dataset    = factor(dataset,
                        levels = c("Auto ACMG outcome before somatic weighting",
                                   "Auto ACMG outcome after somatic weighting"))
  )

DD_dominant_genes <- read_csv("../../Data/DDG2P/G2P_DD_2025-04-16.csv",
                              show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  filter(allelic_requirement %in% c("monoallelic_autosomal",
                                    "monoallelic_X_heterozygous")) %>%
  pull(gene_symbol) %>% unique()

COSMIC_cancer_genes <- read_tsv("../../Data/Gene_definitions/Cosmic_CancerGeneCensus_v98_GRCh37.tsv.gz",
                                 show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  pull(GENE_SYMBOL) %>% unique()

sperm_selection_genes <- c(
  "PTPN11", "MIB1", "RIT1", "FGFR3", "EP300", "FGFR2", "KDM5B", "NF1",
  "SMAD6", "CUL3", "RASA2", "PRRC2A", "PTEN", "ROBO1", "DDX3X", "CSNK2B",
  "KRAS", "PPM1D", "ARID1A", "BRAF", "HRAS", "KMT2E", "SCAF4", "BMPR2",
  "TCF12", "CCAR2", "DHX9", "NSD1", "LZTR1", "ARHGAP35", "CBL", "SSX1",
  "RBM12", "SMAD4", "FAM222B", "KDM5C", "KMT2D", "AR", "CTNNB1", "RAF1"
)

buccal_selection_genes <- c(
  "NOTCH1", "FAT1", "TP53", "NOTCH2", "ATM", "MGA", "KMT2C", "ASXL1",
  "CHEK2", "TET2", "PPM1D", "BCORL1", "ARID1A", "SETD2", "ZFP36L2", "ARID2",
  "EP300", "NOTCH3", "KDM5C", "RAC1", "ARID1B", "RBM10", "KDM6A", "STAG2",
  "EPHA2", "CIC", "SF3B1", "ZFP36L1", "EGFR", "DNMT3A", "PIK3R1", "TP63",
  "ARID5B", "AJUBA", "FGFR3", "ZNF750", "FUBP1", "CUL3", "KLF5", "PAX9",
  "FOXP1", "ETV6", "RHOA", "RARG", "SPOP", "SMARCB1", "CCND1", "HLA-B",
  "EIF1AX", "PIK3CA"
)

upset_gene_lists <- list(
  `Dominant DD`      = DD_dominant_genes,
  `Cancer`           = COSMIC_cancer_genes,
  `Sperm selection`  = sperm_selection_genes,
  `Buccal selection` = buccal_selection_genes
)
```

---

```{r}
############# Data processing for Figure 2a ##############

select_predictor_cols <- c(
  "REVEL plus somatic data",
  "REVEL", "AlphaMissense", "ESM1b",
  "CADD", "PrimateAI", "popEVE",
  "COSMIC count", "COSMIC codon count",
  "Sperm Nanoseq count", "Sperm Nanoseq codon count",
  "Buccal Nanoseq count", "Buccal Nanoseq codon count"
)

plot_dat <- AUCs %>%
  mutate(Predictor = case_when(
    Predictor == "REVEL_LR_model_test_data" ~ "REVEL plus somatic data",
    Predictor == "CADD_raw"                 ~ "CADD",
    Predictor == "n_COSMIC"                 ~ "COSMIC count",
    Predictor == "n_COSMIC_codon_count"     ~ "COSMIC codon count",
    Predictor == "n_sperm"                  ~ "Sperm Nanoseq count",
    Predictor == "n_sperm_codon_count"      ~ "Sperm Nanoseq codon count",
    Predictor == "n_buccal"                 ~ "Buccal Nanoseq count",
    Predictor == "n_buccal_codon_count"     ~ "Buccal Nanoseq codon count",
    TRUE ~ Predictor
  ))
```

```{r}
############# Function: simple AUC dot plot (no facets) ##############

simple_plot_AUC <- function(AUCs, data_name, predictor_cols, my_palette, xlims) {
  df <- AUCs %>%
    filter(data_name == !!data_name) %>%
    filter(Predictor %in% predictor_cols) %>%
    mutate(colour = case_when(
      Predictor %in% c("n_COSMIC", "n_COSMIC_codon_count", "COSMIC count", "COSMIC codon count") ~ "Cancer",
      Predictor %in% c("n_sperm", "n_sperm_codon_count", "Sperm Nanoseq count", "Sperm Nanoseq codon count") ~ "Sperm Nanoseq",
      Predictor %in% c("n_buccal", "n_buccal_codon_count", "Buccal Nanoseq count", "Buccal Nanoseq codon count") ~ "Buccal Nanoseq",
      Predictor %in% c("AlphaMissense", "REVEL", "ESM1b", "CADD_raw", "CADD",
                       "PrimateAI", "VARITY_R", "popEVE", "ESM1v") ~ "Computational effect predictor",
      grepl("LR|plus", Predictor) ~ "Logistic regression model",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )) %>%
    mutate(colour = factor(colour, levels = c(
      "Logistic regression model", "Computational effect predictor",
      "Cancer", "Sperm Nanoseq", "Buccal Nanoseq"
    )))

  ggplot(df, aes(y = factor(Predictor, levels = rev(predictor_cols)), x = AUC_full, colour = colour)) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = AUC_full_lower, xmax = AUC_full_upper), width = 1, orientation = "y") +
    xlim(xlims) +
    labs(colour = "Predictor feature", x = "AUC", y = "") +
    scale_colour_manual(values = my_palette)
}
```

```{r}
############# LR preprocessing for Figure 5a ##############

LR_edit <- LR %>%
  mutate(gene_group = case_when(
    gene_group == "AltFunc"          ~ "Altered function genes",
    gene_group == "RASopathies"      ~ "RASopathy genes",
    gene_group == "AltFunc_minus_RAS"~ "Non-RASopathy Altered function genes",
    gene_group == "LOF"              ~ "Loss of function genes",
    gene_group == "Other"            ~ "Other dominant cancer-DD genes",
    gene_group == "AllGenes"         ~ "All DD genes",
    gene_group == "MacrocephalyGenes"~ "Macrocephaly genes",
    TRUE ~ gene_group
  ))

acmg_lr_pos <- tibble::tibble(
  level = c("Supporting", "Moderate", "Strong"),
  lr    = c(2.08, 4.33, 18.7)
)

acmg_lr_neg <- tibble::tibble(
  level = c("Supporting", "Moderate", "Strong"),
  lr    = c(0.48, 0.23, 0.05)
)
```

```{r}
############# Function: single gene AUC heatmap panel ##############

make_gene_panel <- function(genes, dataset_name) {

  var_table <- n_vars_per_gene_clinvar

  inclusion_genes <- var_table %>%
    dplyr::filter(n_unique_pathogenic >= 10, n_benign >= 10) %>%
    dplyr::pull(gene)

  target_genes <- intersect(genes, inclusion_genes)

  gene_df_somatic <- gene_AUCs_individual_features %>%
    dplyr::filter(dataset == dataset_name) %>%
    dplyr::filter(Predictor %in% c("n_COSMIC_codon_count", "n_sperm_codon_count", "n_buccal_codon_count")) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Predictor_simple = dplyr::case_when(
        Predictor == "n_COSMIC_codon_count" ~ "Cancer",
        Predictor == "n_sperm_codon_count"  ~ "Sperm",
        Predictor == "n_buccal_codon_count" ~ "Buccal",
        TRUE ~ Predictor
      ),
      Predictor_simple = factor(Predictor_simple, levels = c("Cancer", "Sperm", "Buccal"))
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(Predictor_simple, gene, AUC_full, AUC_full_lower, AUC_full_upper) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      somatic_ci_cat = dplyr::case_when(
        (is.na(AUC_full) | is.na(AUC_full_lower) | is.na(AUC_full_upper)) & Predictor_simple == "Buccal" ~ "Not in panel",
        is.na(AUC_full) | is.na(AUC_full_lower) | is.na(AUC_full_upper) ~ "missing",
        AUC_full_lower > 0.8 ~ "Somatic data helpful, AUC lower CI > 0.8",
        AUC_full_lower > 0.7 ~ "Somatic data helpful, AUC lower CI > 0.7",
        AUC_full_lower > 0.6 ~ "Somatic data helpful, AUC lower CI > 0.6",
        AUC_full_upper < 0.4 ~ "Somatic data not helpful, AUC upper CI < 0.4",
        TRUE ~ "Underpowered/inconclusive"
      ),
      auc_label = ifelse(is.na(AUC_full), "", sprintf("%.2f", AUC_full))
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(gene %in% target_genes)

  gene_df_uplift <- gene_AUCs_LR_model %>%
    dplyr::filter(CEP == "REVEL", test_or_train == "test", dataset == dataset_name) %>%
    dplyr::select(gene, AUC_diff, AUC_diff_lower, AUC_diff_upper, delong_p_value) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Predictor_simple = "Uplift",
      uplift_cat = dplyr::case_when(
        is.na(AUC_diff)   ~ "missing",
        AUC_diff < 0      ~ "<0",
        AUC_diff < 0.01   ~ "0–0.01",
        AUC_diff < 0.02   ~ "0.01–0.02",
        AUC_diff < 0.03   ~ "0.02–0.03",
        AUC_diff < 0.05   ~ "0.03–0.05",
        TRUE              ~ ">0.05"
      ),
      uplift_cat = factor(uplift_cat, levels = c("<0","0–0.01","0.01–0.02","0.02–0.03","0.03–0.05",">0.05","missing")),
      p_stars = dplyr::case_when(
        is.na(delong_p_value)      ~ "",
        delong_p_value < 0.001     ~ "***",
        delong_p_value < 0.01      ~ "**",
        delong_p_value < 0.05      ~ "*",
        TRUE                       ~ ""
      ),
      p_stars = ifelse(uplift_cat == "missing", "", p_stars)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(gene %in% target_genes)

  common_genes <- intersect(as.character(unique(gene_df_somatic$gene)),
                            as.character(unique(gene_df_uplift$gene)))

  gene_df_somatic <- gene_df_somatic %>% dplyr::mutate(gene = as.character(gene)) %>% dplyr::filter(gene %in% common_genes)
  gene_df_uplift  <- gene_df_uplift  %>% dplyr::mutate(gene = as.character(gene)) %>% dplyr::filter(gene %in% common_genes)

  gene_levels <- gene_df_somatic %>%
    dplyr::filter(Predictor_simple == "Cancer") %>%
    dplyr::select(gene, AUC_full) %>% dplyr::distinct() %>%
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(AUC_full), gene) %>% dplyr::pull(gene)
  gene_levels <- c(gene_levels, setdiff(common_genes, gene_levels))

  gene_df_somatic <- gene_df_somatic %>% dplyr::mutate(gene = factor(gene, levels = rev(gene_levels)))
  gene_df_uplift  <- gene_df_uplift  %>% dplyr::mutate(gene = factor(gene, levels = rev(gene_levels)))

  somatic_ci_cols <- c(
    "Somatic data helpful, AUC lower CI > 0.8" = "#a63642",
    "Somatic data helpful, AUC lower CI > 0.7" = "#d6605c",
    "Somatic data helpful, AUC lower CI > 0.6" = "#f07f78",
    "Underpowered/inconclusive"                = "#fffde7",
    "Somatic data not helpful, AUC upper CI < 0.4" = "#f6e58d",
    "Not in panel"                             = "grey70",
    "missing"                                  = "grey70"
  )
  uplift_cols <- c(
    "<0"        = "#F7FBFF", "0–0.01"    = "#C6DBEF",
    "0.01–0.02" = "#9ECAE1", "0.02–0.03" = "#6BAED6",
    "0.03–0.05" = "#4292C6", ">0.05"     = "#2171B5",
    "missing"   = "grey70"
  )

  p_heat <- ggplot() +
    geom_tile(data = gene_df_somatic,
              aes(x = Predictor_simple, y = gene, fill = somatic_ci_cat), colour = "grey20") +
    geom_text(data = gene_df_somatic,
              aes(x = Predictor_simple, y = gene, label = auc_label), size = 3) +
    scale_fill_manual(name = "Somatic AUC confidence group", values = somatic_ci_cols) +
    ggnewscale::new_scale_fill() +
    geom_tile(data = gene_df_uplift,
              aes(x = Predictor_simple, y = gene, fill = uplift_cat), colour = "grey20") +
    scale_fill_manual(name = "AUC uplift from adding somatic data", values = uplift_cols) +
    geom_text(data = gene_df_uplift %>% dplyr::filter(p_stars != ""),
              aes(x = Predictor_simple, y = gene, label = p_stars), size = 3) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1),
          panel.grid = element_blank(), legend.position = "left") +
    labs(x = "AUC \n Clinvar Vs UK Biobank", y = " ")

  gene_counts_df <- var_table %>%
    dplyr::filter(gene %in% common_genes) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = c(n_unique_pathogenic, n_pathogenic, n_benign),
                        names_to = "metric", values_to = "value") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      metric = dplyr::recode(metric,
        n_unique_pathogenic = "n unique pathogenic variants",
        n_pathogenic        = "n pathogenic variants",
        n_benign            = "n benign variants"),
      metric = factor(metric, levels = c("n unique pathogenic variants",
                                         "n pathogenic variants",
                                         "n benign variants")),
      gene  = factor(gene, levels = rev(gene_levels)),
      label = ifelse(is.na(value), "", format(value, big.mark = ","))
    )

  p_table <- ggplot(gene_counts_df, aes(x = metric, y = gene)) +
    geom_tile(fill = "white", colour = "grey80") +
    geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3) +
    scale_x_discrete(position = "top") +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_blank(),
          axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 0),
          plot.margin = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 5.5, l = 0))

  (p_heat + p_table) + patchwork::plot_layout(widths = c(4.5, 4))
}
```

```{r}
############# Functions: PTPN11 MAVE codon panel (Figure 3b) ##############

aa_levels_mave <- c("A","R","N","D","C","Q","E","G","H","I",
                    "L","K","M","F","P","S","T","W","Y","V","stop")

mave_heatmap_plot <- function(MAVE_gene, max_codon) {
  mave_plot_df <- MAVE_gene %>%
    transmute(codon = pos,
              mut = factor(mut, levels = rev(aa_levels_mave)),
              enrichment_ave) %>%
    tidyr::complete(codon = seq_len(max_codon),
                    mut = factor(rev(aa_levels_mave), levels = rev(aa_levels_mave)))

  lim <- max(abs(mave_plot_df$enrichment_ave), na.rm = TRUE)
  if (!is.finite(lim) || is.na(lim) || lim == 0) lim <- 1

  ggplot(mave_plot_df, aes(x = codon, y = mut, fill = enrichment_ave)) +
    geom_tile(height = 0.95, width = 0.95) +
    xlab("Codon") + ylab(NULL) +
    xaxis_codons(max_codon) +
    scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#2166AC", mid = "white", high = "#B2182B",
                         midpoint = 0, limits = c(-lim, lim),
                         na.value = "grey80", name = "MAVE enrichment") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_blank(),
          axis.ticks.y = element_blank(), axis.title.y = element_blank(),
          legend.position = "right")
}

alphamissense_heatmap_plot <- function(AM_data, max_codon) {
  am_plot_df <- AM_data %>%
    group_by(codon, alt_aa) %>%
    summarise(am_pathogenicity = mean(am_pathogenicity, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    transmute(codon, mut = factor(alt_aa, levels = rev(aa_levels_mave)), am_pathogenicity) %>%
    tidyr::complete(codon = seq_len(max_codon),
                    mut = factor(rev(aa_levels_mave), levels = rev(aa_levels_mave)))

  ggplot(am_plot_df, aes(x = codon, y = mut, fill = am_pathogenicity)) +
    geom_tile(height = 0.95, width = 0.95) +
    xlab("Codon") + ylab(NULL) +
    xaxis_codons(max_codon) +
    scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "#B2182B",
                        limits = c(0, 1), na.value = "grey80",
                        name = "AM score") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
          panel.background = element_rect(fill = "grey80"),
          axis.text.y = element_blank(),
          axis.ticks.y = element_blank(), axis.title.y = element_blank(),
          legend.position = "right")
}

mave_bar_plot <- function(MAVE_gene, max_codon) {
  mave_bar_df <- MAVE_gene %>%
    group_by(pos) %>%
    summarise(enrichment_sum = sum(enrichment_ave, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

  ggplot(mave_bar_df, aes(x = pos, y = enrichment_sum)) +
    geom_col(aes(fill = enrichment_sum > 0), width = 1, show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#B2182B", "FALSE" = "#2166AC")) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.3, colour = "grey40") +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 1)) +
    xlab("Codon") + ylab(NULL) +
    xaxis_codons(max_codon) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.title.y = element_blank(), legend.position = "none")
}

alphamissense_bar_plot <- function(AM_data, max_codon) {
  am_bar_df <- AM_data %>%
    group_by(codon) %>%
    summarise(am_sum = sum(am_pathogenicity, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

  ggplot(am_bar_df, aes(x = codon, y = am_sum)) +
    geom_col(width = 1, fill = "#B2182B") +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 1)) +
    xlab("Codon") + ylab(NULL) +
    xaxis_codons(max_codon) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.title.y = element_blank(), legend.position = "none")
}

generate_ptpn11_mave_panel <- function(gene_symbol, clinvar, COSMIC, DNMs, sperm, MAVE,
                                       AlphaMissense = NULL,
                                       am_style   = c("heatmap", "bar"),
                                       mave_style = c("heatmap", "bar"),
                                       panel_labels = c("left", "none")) {
  am_style   <- match.arg(am_style)
  mave_style <- match.arg(mave_style)
  panel_labels <- match.arg(panel_labels)
  missense_colors_local <- c("missense" = "#882255", "non_missense" = "#6699CC")

  clinvar_gene <- clinvar %>% filter(gene == gene_symbol)
  COSMIC_gene  <- COSMIC  %>% filter(gene == gene_symbol)
  DNMs_gene    <- DNMs    %>% filter(gene == gene_symbol)
  Sperm_gene   <- sperm   %>% filter(gene == gene_symbol)
  MAVE_gene    <- MAVE

  max_codon <- suppressWarnings(max(c(
    ifelse(nrow(clinvar_gene) > 0, max(clinvar_gene$codon, na.rm = TRUE), -Inf),
    ifelse(nrow(COSMIC_gene)  > 0, max(COSMIC_gene$codon,  na.rm = TRUE), -Inf),
    ifelse(nrow(DNMs_gene)    > 0, max(DNMs_gene$codon,    na.rm = TRUE), -Inf),
    ifelse(nrow(Sperm_gene)   > 0, max(Sperm_gene$codon,   na.rm = TRUE), -Inf),
    ifelse(nrow(MAVE_gene)    > 0, max(MAVE_gene$pos,      na.rm = TRUE), -Inf),
    ifelse(!is.null(AlphaMissense) && nrow(AlphaMissense) > 0,
           max(AlphaMissense$codon, na.rm = TRUE), -Inf)
  ), na.rm = TRUE))
  if (!is.finite(max_codon) || is.na(max_codon) || max_codon <= 0) max_codon <- 1

  base_theme <- theme(plot.title = element_blank(), legend.position = "none",
                      axis.title.y = element_blank())

  make_bar <- function(df, x_col, y_col) {
    df %>%
      mutate(missense = factor(missense, levels = c("missense", "non_missense"))) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = .data[[x_col]], y = .data[[y_col]],
                 fill = missense, colour = missense)) +
      geom_col(width = 1, linewidth = 0.25, na.rm = TRUE) +
      xlab("") + xaxis_codons(max_codon) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = missense_colors_local,
                        breaks = c("missense", "non_missense"), drop = FALSE) +
      scale_colour_manual(values = missense_colors_local,
                          breaks = c("missense", "non_missense"), drop = FALSE, guide = "none") +
      base_theme
  }

  clinvar_plot <- make_bar(clinvar_gene, "codon", "NumberSubmitters")
  dnm_plot     <- make_bar(DNMs_gene,    "codon", "n_DNM")
  cosmic_plot  <- make_bar(COSMIC_gene,  "codon", "n_COSMIC")
  sperm_plot   <- make_bar(Sperm_gene,   "codon", "n_sperm")
  MAVE_plot    <- (if (mave_style == "bar") mave_bar_plot(MAVE_gene, max_codon)
                   else mave_heatmap_plot(MAVE_gene, max_codon)) +
    theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 5.5, l = 18))

  labels <- c(
    "n ClinVar P/LP", "n DNM", "n COSMIC", "n Sperm nanoseq",
    if (mave_style == "bar") "MAVE score sum" else "MAVE",
    if (am_style   == "bar") "AlphaMissense score sum" else "AlphaMissense"
  )

  if (!is.null(AlphaMissense)) {
    AM_plot <- if (am_style == "bar") {
      alphamissense_bar_plot(AlphaMissense, max_codon)
    } else {
      alphamissense_heatmap_plot(AlphaMissense, max_codon)
    }
    AM_plot <- AM_plot +
      theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 5.5, l = 18))
    sw <- max(0.26, max(nchar(labels)) / 15 * 0.26)
    if (panel_labels == "left") {
      combined_plots <-
        left_labeled_panel(clinvar_plot, labels[1], strip_width = sw) /
        left_labeled_panel(dnm_plot,     labels[2], strip_width = sw) /
        left_labeled_panel(cosmic_plot,  labels[3], strip_width = sw) /
        left_labeled_panel(sperm_plot,   labels[4], strip_width = sw) /
        left_labeled_panel(MAVE_plot,    labels[5], strip_width = sw) /
        left_labeled_panel(AM_plot,      labels[6], strip_width = sw) +
        plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1, 1, 1, 1.3, 1.3))
    } else {
      combined_plots <-
        clinvar_plot / dnm_plot / cosmic_plot / sperm_plot / MAVE_plot / AM_plot +
        plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1, 1, 1, 1.3, 1.3))
    }
  } else if (panel_labels == "left") {
    sw <- max(0.26, max(nchar(labels[1:5])) / 15 * 0.26)
    combined_plots <-
      left_labeled_panel(clinvar_plot, labels[1], strip_width = sw) /
      left_labeled_panel(dnm_plot,     labels[2], strip_width = sw) /
      left_labeled_panel(cosmic_plot,  labels[3], strip_width = sw) /
      left_labeled_panel(sperm_plot,   labels[4], strip_width = sw) /
      left_labeled_panel(MAVE_plot,    labels[5], strip_width = sw) +
      plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1, 1, 1, 1.3))
  } else {
    combined_plots <-
      clinvar_plot / dnm_plot / cosmic_plot / sperm_plot / MAVE_plot +
      plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1, 1, 1, 1.3))
  }

  gene_title <- wrap_elements(
    full = grid::textGrob(gene_symbol, x = unit(0, "npc"), just = c("left", "top"),
                          gp = grid::gpar(fontface = "bold", cex = 1.25))
  )
  gene_title / combined_plots + plot_layout(heights = c(0.08, 1))
}
```

---

# Figures

## Graphic abstract

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics("../../Data/Figures/Final/FigureLabs_graphic_abstract.jpg")
```

## Figure 1: Mutation frequency and distribution

```{r, fig.width=16, fig.height=8, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
p1 <- generate_gene_panel_plots("PTPN11", clinvar_vis, COSMIC_vis, DNMs_vis, sperm_vis, buccal_vis, panel_labels = "none")
p2 <- generate_gene_panel_plots("PIK3CA", clinvar_vis, COSMIC_vis, DNMs_vis, sperm_vis, buccal_vis, panel_labels = "none")
p3 <- generate_gene_panel_plots("RIT1",   clinvar_vis, COSMIC_vis, DNMs_vis, sperm_vis, buccal_vis, panel_labels = "none")
p4 <- generate_gene_panel_plots("SMAD4",  clinvar_vis, COSMIC_vis, DNMs_vis, sperm_vis, buccal_vis, panel_labels = "none")

fig1 <- combine_gene_panel_plots_shared_labels(list(p1, p2, p3, p4), ncol = 4, show_legend = TRUE)
fig1
ggsave("../../Data/Figures/Final/Gene_mutation_distribution.png", fig1, width = 16, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

## Figure 2a: Somatic feature performance in RASopathy genes

```{r, fig.width=8, fig.height=4}
ras_dat <- plot_dat %>% filter(gene_group == "RASopathy")

ras_plot <- simple_plot_AUC(ras_dat, "clinvar_count_weighted",
                            select_predictor_cols, safe_colorblind_palette, xlims = c(0.40, 1)) +
  xlab("AUC \n Clinvar (likely) pathogenic Vs UK Biobank") +
  ggtitle("RASopathy genes")

ras_plot
ggsave("../../Data/Figures/Final/RASopathy_AUC_plot_clinvar_count_weighted_240426.png",
       ras_plot, width = 8, height = 4, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

## Figure 2b: Gene group AUC summary heatmap

```{r, warning=FALSE}
gene_table    <- n_genes %>% filter(data_name == "clinvar_count_weighted") %>% dplyr::select(-data_name, -any_of("gene_set"))
var_table_cw     <- n_vars %>% filter(data_name == "clinvar_count_weighted") %>% dplyr::select(-data_name, -any_of("gene_set"))
var_table_unique <- n_vars %>% filter(data_name == "clinvar_unique") %>%
  dplyr::select(-data_name, -any_of("gene_set"), -n_benign_variants) %>%
  dplyr::rename(n_path_variants_unique = n_path_variants)
var_table <- var_table_cw %>%
  left_join(var_table_unique, by = "gene_group") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene_group, n_path_variants, n_path_variants_unique, n_benign_variants)

recode_group <- function(x) case_when(
  x == "altfunc"          ~ "Altered function genes",
  x == "RASopathy"        ~ "RASopathy genes",
  x == "altfunc_minus_RAS"~ "Non-RASopathy Altered function genes",
  x == "lof"              ~ "Loss of function genes",
  x == "other"            ~ "Other dominant cancer-DD genes",
  x == "all"              ~ "All DD genes",
  TRUE ~ x
)

assign_facet <- function(group) case_when(
  group == "All DD genes"                          ~ "All DD genes",
  group %in% c("Altered function genes", "RASopathy genes",
               "Non-RASopathy Altered function genes") ~ "Altered function genes",
  group == "Loss of function genes"                ~ "Loss of function genes",
  group == "Other dominant cancer-DD genes"        ~ "Other dominant cancer-DD genes",
  TRUE ~ "Other"
)

facet_levels      <- c("All DD genes", "Altered function genes",
                       "Loss of function genes", "Other dominant cancer-DD genes")
gene_group_levels <- c("Non-RASopathy Altered function genes", "RASopathy genes",
                       "Altered function genes", "Loss of function genes",
                       "Other dominant cancer-DD genes", "All DD genes")

df_somatic <- AUCs %>%
  filter(data_name == "clinvar_count_weighted") %>%
  filter(Predictor %in% c("n_COSMIC_codon_count", "n_sperm_codon_count", "n_buccal_codon_count")) %>%
  mutate(
    Predictor_simple = case_when(
      Predictor == "n_COSMIC_codon_count" ~ "Cancer",
      Predictor == "n_sperm_codon_count"  ~ "Sperm",
      Predictor == "n_buccal_codon_count" ~ "Buccal",
      TRUE ~ Predictor
    ),
    Predictor_simple = factor(Predictor_simple, levels = c("Cancer", "Sperm", "Buccal"))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(Predictor_simple, gene_group, AUC_full, AUC_full_lower, AUC_full_upper) %>%
  mutate(
    somatic_ci_cat = case_when(
      (is.na(AUC_full) | is.na(AUC_full_lower) | is.na(AUC_full_upper)) & Predictor_simple == "Buccal" ~ "Not in panel",
      is.na(AUC_full) | is.na(AUC_full_lower) | is.na(AUC_full_upper) ~ "missing",
      AUC_full_lower > 0.8 ~ "Somatic data helpful, AUC lower CI > 0.8",
      AUC_full_lower > 0.7 ~ "Somatic data helpful, AUC lower CI > 0.7",
      AUC_full_lower > 0.6 ~ "Somatic data helpful, AUC lower CI > 0.6",
      AUC_full_upper < 0.4 ~ "Somatic data not helpful, AUC upper CI < 0.4",
      TRUE ~ "Underpowered/inconclusive"
    ),
    auc_label = ifelse(is.na(AUC_full), "", sprintf("%.2f", AUC_full))
  ) %>%
  mutate(gene_group = recode_group(gene_group)) %>%
  mutate(facet_panel = assign_facet(gene_group),
         facet_panel = factor(facet_panel, levels = facet_levels),
         gene_group  = factor(gene_group,  levels = gene_group_levels),
         gene_group_child = case_when(
           gene_group == "RASopathy genes" ~ "RASopathy genes",
           gene_group == "Non-RASopathy Altered function genes" ~ "Non-RASopathy altered function genes",
           TRUE ~ as.character(gene_group)
         ))

df_uplift <- AUCs_LR_model %>%
  filter(cep == "REVEL", test_or_train == "test", data_name == "clinvar_count_weighted") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene_group, AUC_diff, AUC_diff_lower, AUC_diff_upper, delong_p_value) %>%
  mutate(Predictor_simple = "Uplift") %>%
  mutate(
    uplift_cat = case_when(
      is.na(AUC_diff) ~ "missing",
      AUC_diff < 0    ~ "<0",
      AUC_diff < 0.01 ~ "0–0.01",
      AUC_diff < 0.02 ~ "0.01–0.02",
      AUC_diff < 0.03 ~ "0.02–0.03",
      AUC_diff < 0.05 ~ "0.03–0.05",
      TRUE            ~ ">0.05"
    ),
    uplift_cat = factor(uplift_cat, levels = c("<0","0–0.01","0.01–0.02","0.02–0.03","0.03–0.05",">0.05")),
    p_stars = case_when(
      is.na(delong_p_value) ~ "",
      delong_p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
      delong_p_value < 0.01  ~ "**",
      delong_p_value < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ ""
    ),
    p_stars = ifelse(uplift_cat == "missing", "", p_stars)
  ) %>%
  mutate(gene_group = recode_group(gene_group)) %>%
  mutate(facet_panel = assign_facet(gene_group),
         facet_panel = factor(facet_panel, levels = facet_levels),
         gene_group  = factor(gene_group,  levels = gene_group_levels),
         gene_group_child = case_when(
           gene_group == "RASopathy genes" ~ "RASopathy genes",
           gene_group == "Non-RASopathy Altered function genes" ~ "Non-RASopathy altered function genes",
           TRUE ~ as.character(gene_group)
         ))

somatic_ci_cols <- c(
  "Somatic data helpful, AUC lower CI > 0.8" = "#a63642",
  "Somatic data helpful, AUC lower CI > 0.7" = "#d6605c",
  "Somatic data helpful, AUC lower CI > 0.6" = "#f07f78",
  "Underpowered/inconclusive"                = "#fffde7",
  "Somatic data not helpful, AUC upper CI < 0.4" = "#f6e58d",
  "Not in panel" = "grey70", "missing" = "grey70"
)
uplift_cols <- c(
  "<0" = "#F7FBFF", "0–0.01" = "#C6DBEF", "0.01–0.02" = "#9ECAE1",
  "0.02–0.03" = "#6BAED6", "0.03–0.05" = "#4292C6", ">0.05" = "#2171B5",
  "missing" = "grey70"
)

p_heat <- ggplot() +
  geom_tile(data = df_somatic, aes(x = Predictor_simple, y = gene_group, fill = somatic_ci_cat), colour = "grey20") +
  geom_text(data = df_somatic, aes(x = Predictor_simple, y = gene_group, label = auc_label), size = 3, colour = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Somatic AUC confidence group", values = somatic_ci_cols,
    breaks = c("Somatic data helpful, AUC lower CI > 0.8","Somatic data helpful, AUC lower CI > 0.7",
               "Somatic data helpful, AUC lower CI > 0.6","Underpowered/inconclusive",
               "Somatic data not helpful, AUC upper CI < 0.4","Not in panel","missing"),
    labels = c("Somatic data helpful AUC lower CI > 0.8","Somatic data helpful AUC lower CI > 0.7",
               "Somatic data helpful AUC lower CI > 0.6","Underpowered/inconclusive",
               "Somatic data not helpful, AUC upper CI < 0.4","Not in panel","Missing")) +
  ggnewscale::new_scale_fill() +
  geom_tile(data = df_uplift, aes(x = Predictor_simple, y = gene_group, fill = uplift_cat), colour = "grey20") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "AUC uplift from adding somatic data", values = uplift_cols,
    breaks = c(">0.05","0–0.01","0.01–0.02","<0","missing"),
    labels = c(">0.05","0–0.01","0.01–0.02","<0","Missing")) +
  geom_text(data = df_uplift %>% filter(p_stars != ""),
            aes(x = Predictor_simple, y = gene_group, label = p_stars), size = 3, colour = "black") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10), axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1),
        panel.grid = element_blank(), legend.position = "left") +
  labs(x = "AUC \n Clinvar (likely) pathogenic Vs UK Biobank", y = " ") +
  facet_grid(facet_panel ~ ., scales = "free_y", space = "free_y") +
  theme(strip.placement = "outside", strip.text.y = element_blank(), strip.background = element_blank())

table_facet_levels     <- facet_levels
table_gene_group_levels <- gene_group_levels

counts_df <- gene_table %>%
  left_join(var_table, by = "gene_group") %>%
  mutate(gene_group  = recode_group(gene_group),
         facet_panel = assign_facet(gene_group),
         facet_panel = factor(facet_panel, levels = table_facet_levels),
         gene_group  = factor(gene_group,  levels = table_gene_group_levels)) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = c(gene_count, n_path_variants, n_benign_variants),
                      names_to = "metric", values_to = "value") %>%
  mutate(metric = recode(metric,
    gene_count = "n genes", n_path_variants = "n pathogenic variants", n_benign_variants = "n benign variants"),
    metric = factor(metric, levels = c("n genes","n pathogenic variants","n benign variants")),
    label  = ifelse(is.na(value), "", format(value, big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE)))

p_table <- ggplot(counts_df, aes(x = metric, y = gene_group)) +
  geom_tile(fill = "white", colour = "grey80") +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3) +
  facet_grid(facet_panel ~ ., scales = "free_y", space = "free_y") +
  scale_x_discrete(position = "top") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_blank(), axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 0),
        strip.text.y = element_blank(), strip.background = element_blank(),
        plot.margin = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 5.5, l = 0))

p <- (p_heat + p_table) + plot_layout(widths = c(4.5, 4))
```

```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
print(p)
ggsave("../../Data/Figures/Final/clinvar_count_weighted_AUC_heatmap_with_counts_240426.png",
       p, width = 10, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

## Figure 3a: Somatic data can out-perform or rival MAVEs

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=10}
combined_dat <- bind_rows(
  PTPN11_dat %>% filter(Form == "Long") %>%
    dplyr::rename(feature = Predictor) %>%
    filter(feature %in% c("enrichment_ave", "n_COSMIC_codon_count", "n_sperm_codon_count",
                          "AlphaMissense_score", "REVEL_score")) %>%
    mutate(Gene = "PTPN11",
           feature = case_when(
             feature == "enrichment_ave"    ~ "MAVE (activation)",
             feature == "AlphaMissense_score" ~ "AlphaMissense",
             feature == "REVEL_score"         ~ "REVEL",
             TRUE ~ feature
           )),
  PTEN_MAVE %>%
    filter(feature %in% c("activity_MAVE","abundance_MAVE","n_COSMIC_codon_count",
                          "n_sperm_codon_count","AlphaMissense","REVEL")) %>%
    mutate(Gene = "PTEN"),
  DDX3X_MAVE %>%
    filter(feature %in% c("MAVE_score","n_COSMIC_codon_count","n_sperm_codon_count",
                          "AlphaMissense","REVEL")) %>%
    mutate(Gene = "DDX3X"),
  HRAS_MAVE %>%
    filter(feature %in% c("MAVE_score","n_COSMIC_codon_count","n_sperm_codon_count",
                          "AlphaMissense","REVEL")) %>%
    mutate(Gene = "HRAS",
           feature = case_when(feature == "MAVE_score" ~ "MAVE (activation)", TRUE ~ feature))
) %>% dplyr::select(-any_of(c("Form","colour")))
```

```{r, fig.width=14, fig.height=3}
predictors_renamed <- c("AlphaMissense","REVEL","COSMIC missense codon count",
                        "Sperm nanoseq missense codon count",
                        "MAVE (depletion)","MAVE (activity)","MAVE (abundance)")

combined_dat %>%
  mutate(fill_factor = case_when(
    feature %in% c("n_COSMIC_codon_count","n_sperm_codon_count") ~ "Somatic data",
    feature %in% c("MAVE (activation)","activity_MAVE","abundance_MAVE","MAVE_score") ~ "Functional data (MAVE)",
    TRUE ~ "Computational predictors"
  )) %>%
  mutate(feature = case_when(
    feature == "n_COSMIC_codon_count"  ~ "COSMIC missense codon count",
    feature == "n_sperm_codon_count"   ~ "Sperm nanoseq missense codon count",
    feature == "MAVE (activation)"     ~ "MAVE (activity)",
    feature == "activity_MAVE"         ~ "MAVE (activity)",
    feature == "abundance_MAVE"        ~ "MAVE (abundance)",
    feature == "MAVE_score"            ~ "MAVE (depletion)",
    TRUE ~ feature
  )) %>%
  mutate(feature = factor(feature, levels = predictors_renamed)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = feature, y = AUC, color = fill_factor)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = CI_lower, ymax = CI_upper), width = 0.2,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = " ", y = "AUC \n Clinvar (likely) pathogenic Vs UK Biobank \n missense variants") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.1)) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank()) +
  facet_wrap(~factor(Gene, levels = c("HRAS","PTPN11","PTEN","DDX3X")), ncol = 4) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Somatic data" = "#6699CC",
                                "Functional data (MAVE)" = "#804000",
                                "Computational predictors" = "#FF8080"))

ggsave("../../Data/Figures/Final/MAVE_Vs_somatic_data_plot.png", width = 12, height = 3, dpi = 300)
```

## Figure 3b: PTPN11 mutation frequency and MAVE enrichment

```{r, fig.width=8, fig.height=10, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
fig3b <- generate_ptpn11_mave_panel(
  gene_symbol   = "PTPN11",
  clinvar       = clinvar_vis,
  COSMIC        = COSMIC_vis,
  DNMs          = DNMs_vis,
  sperm         = sperm_vis,
  MAVE          = PTPN11_MAVE_vis,
  AlphaMissense = PTPN11_AM_vis,
  panel_labels  = "left"
)
fig3b
```

## Figure 3b: PTPN11 mutation frequency (bar plot summary)

```{r, fig.width=6, fig.height=6, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
panel_levels <- c("n ClinVar P/LP", "n DNM", "n COSMIC",
                  "n Sperm nanoseq", "MAVE score sum", "AlphaMissense score sum")

ptpn11_bar_df <- bind_rows(
  clinvar_vis %>% filter(gene == "PTPN11") %>%
    group_by(codon) %>% summarise(value = sum(NumberSubmitters, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(panel = "n ClinVar P/LP"),
  DNMs_vis %>% filter(gene == "PTPN11") %>%
    group_by(codon) %>% summarise(value = sum(n_DNM, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(panel = "n DNM"),
  COSMIC_vis %>% filter(gene == "PTPN11") %>%
    group_by(codon) %>% summarise(value = sum(n_COSMIC, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(panel = "n COSMIC"),
  sperm_vis %>% filter(gene == "PTPN11") %>%
    group_by(codon) %>% summarise(value = sum(n_sperm, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(panel = "n Sperm nanoseq"),
  PTPN11_MAVE_vis %>%
    group_by(codon = pos) %>%
    summarise(value = sum(enrichment_ave, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(panel = "MAVE score sum"),
  PTPN11_AM_vis %>%
    group_by(codon) %>% summarise(value = sum(am_pathogenicity, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(panel = "AlphaMissense score sum")
) %>%
  mutate(
    panel    = factor(panel, levels = panel_levels),
    fill_col = case_when(
      panel == "MAVE score sum" & value > 0  ~ "mave_pos",
      panel == "MAVE score sum" & value <= 0 ~ "mave_neg",
      TRUE ~ "count"
    )
  )

hline_df <- tibble(panel = factor("MAVE score sum", levels = panel_levels), yintercept = 0)

max_codon_bar <- max(ptpn11_bar_df$codon, na.rm = TRUE)

fig3b_bar <- ggplot(ptpn11_bar_df, aes(x = codon, y = value, fill = fill_col, colour = fill_col)) +
  geom_col(width = 1, linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_hline(data = hline_df, aes(yintercept = yintercept),
             linewidth = 0.3, colour = "grey40", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("count" = "#882255", "mave_pos" = "#B2182B",
                               "mave_neg" = "#2166AC"), guide = "none") +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("count" = "#882255", "mave_pos" = "#B2182B",
                                 "mave_neg" = "#2166AC"), guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, max_codon_bar + 20),
                     breaks = seq(0, max_codon_bar + 20, by = 100)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 1)) +
  facet_wrap(~panel, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(x = "Codon", y = NULL, title = "PTPN11") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

fig3b_bar
ggsave("../../Data/Figures/Final/PTPN11_MAVE_codon_plot.png", fig3b_bar,
       width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

## Figure 4: Somatic data utility in RASopathy VCEP genes

```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
make_gene_panel(RASopathies, "clinvar_count_weighted")
ggsave("../../Data/Figures/Final/RASopathy_genes_clinvar_long_panel_heatmap.png",
       width = 10, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

## Figure 5a: Calibration of COSMIC codon count evidence

```{r, fig.width=9, fig.height=5}
LR_edit %>%
  filter(data_set == "clinvar_long_public", !threshold == "1-4",
         !gene_group == "Macrocephaly genes",
         feature == "n_COSMIC_codon_count") %>%
  dplyr::arrange(gene_group, sensitivity) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = sensitivity, y = LR_pos, colour = gene_group, group = gene_group)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = LR_pos_low95, ymax = LR_pos_high95),
                width = 0.005, linewidth = 0.4, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 1.5) +
  geom_hline(data = acmg_lr_pos, aes(yintercept = lr),
             linetype = "dotted", colour = "grey40", linewidth = 0.5, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = acmg_lr_pos, aes(x = 1.1, y = lr, label = level),
            hjust = 1.05, vjust = -0.1, colour = "grey40", size = 3, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text_repel(data = ~ dplyr::filter(.x, gene_group == "RASopathy genes"),
                  aes(label = threshold), size = 3, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  labs(y = "Positive likelihood ratio", colour = "Gene group") +
  scale_colour_manual(values = safe_colorblind_palette) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(5.5, 30, 5.5, 5.5))

ggsave("../../Data/Figures/Final/COSMIC_codon_count_LR_plot.png", width = 9, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

## Figure 5b: Auto-ACMG before and after somatic weighting (all pathogenicity classes)

```{r, fig.width=7, fig.height=3}
label_dat_all <- acmg_combined %>%
  count(dataset, group, acmg_class) %>%
  group_by(dataset, group) %>%
  mutate(prop  = n / sum(n),
         label = ifelse(prop >= 0.04, as.character(n), ""))

ggplot(acmg_combined,
       aes(x = factor(group, levels = c("(likely) benign", "VUS", "Conflicting",
                                        "(likely) pathogenic")),
           fill = acmg_class)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  geom_text(data = label_dat_all,
            aes(y = prop, label = label),
            position = position_fill(vjust = 0.5),
            size = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = acmg_colours) +
  labs(x = "ClinVar class", fill = "", y = "Proportion") +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_wrap(~ dataset, ncol = 1)

ggsave("../../Data/Figures/Final/Ras_Auto_ACMG_before_after_somatic_weighting_all_classes.png",
       width = 7, height = 3, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

---

# Supplementary figures

## Supplementary Figure S1: Gene overlap — dominant DD, cancer, and somatic selection genes

```{r, fig.width=7, fig.height=4}
upset(fromList(upset_gene_lists), order.by = "freq")

ragg::agg_png(
  "../../Data/Figures/Final/Supplement/Gene_upset_plot_DD_cancer_somatic_selection_genes.png",
  width = 7, height = 4, units = "in", res = 300
)
upset(fromList(upset_gene_lists), order.by = "freq")
dev.off()
```

## Supplementary Figure S2a: Altered function genes

```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
make_gene_panel(altfunc, "clinvar_count_weighted")
ggsave("../../Data/Figures/Final/Supplement/AltFunc_genes_clinvar_long_heatmap.png",
       width = 10, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```

## Supplementary Figure S2b: Loss of function genes

```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
make_gene_panel(lof, "clinvar_count_weighted")
ggsave("../../Data/Figures/Final/Supplement/LOF_genes_clinvar_long_panel.png",
       width = 10, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```

## Supplementary Figure S2c: Other DD-somatic genes

```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
make_gene_panel(other, "clinvar_count_weighted")
ggsave("../../Data/Figures/Final/Supplement/Other_DD_somatic_genes_clinvar_long_panel.png",
       width = 10, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```

---

## Supplementary Figure S3: COSMIC codon count LRs by data type

Positive LRs for COSMIC missense codon count thresholds >0 through >10, and negative LR
for the rule "COSMIC missense codon count = 0", in RASopathy genes. Data types shown are
the three publicly available datasets (ClinVar unique, ClinVar count-weighted, DNM
count-weighted 31k cohort). DNM unique LRs are not pre-computed in the public LR table
and are therefore not shown.

```{r, fig.width=4, fig.height=8}
LR_supp3 <- LR_edit %>%
  filter(
    feature    == "n_COSMIC_codon_count",
    gene_group == "RASopathy genes",
    !threshold %in% c("1-4", ">20", ">50")
  ) %>%
  mutate(data_set = case_when(
    data_set == "clinvar_unique_public"  ~ "ClinVar unique",
    data_set == "clinvar_long_public"    ~ "ClinVar count-weighted",
    data_set == "DNMs_31k_long_public"   ~ "DNM count-weighted",
    data_set == "DNMs_31k_unique_public" ~ "DNM unique",
    TRUE ~ data_set
  )) %>%
  mutate(data_set = factor(data_set,
                           levels = c("DNM count-weighted", "DNM unique",
                                      "ClinVar unique", "ClinVar count-weighted")))

p_supp3_pos <- ggplot(LR_supp3, aes(y = data_set, x = LR_pos)) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = LR_pos_low95, xmax = LR_pos_high95),
                 height = 0.2, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(data = acmg_lr_pos, aes(xintercept = lr),
             linetype = "dotted", colour = "grey40", linewidth = 0.5, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = acmg_lr_pos, aes(x = lr, y = Inf, label = level),
            angle = 90, colour = "grey50", size = 3, vjust = 1, hjust = 1.1, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  facet_wrap(~ factor(threshold, levels = c(">0", ">1", ">2", ">3", ">5", ">10")), ncol = 1) +
  labs(x = "Positive likelihood ratio", y = "") +
  theme_bw() +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(5.5, 20, 5.5, 5.5))

p_supp3_neg <- LR_supp3 %>%
  filter(threshold == ">0") %>%
  mutate(threshold = "= 0") %>%
  ggplot(aes(y = data_set, x = LR_neg)) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = LR_neg_low95, xmax = LR_neg_high95),
                 height = 0.2, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(data = acmg_lr_neg, aes(xintercept = lr),
             linetype = "dotted", colour = "grey40", linewidth = 0.5, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = acmg_lr_neg, aes(x = lr, y = Inf, label = level),
            angle = 90, colour = "grey50", size = 3, vjust = 1, hjust = 1.1, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  facet_wrap(~ threshold, ncol = 1) +
  labs(x = "Negative likelihood ratio", y = "") +
  theme_bw() +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(5.5, 20, 5.5, 5.5))

supp_fig3 <- p_supp3_pos / p_supp3_neg + plot_layout(heights = c(10, 1.5))
print(supp_fig3)

ggsave("../../Data/Figures/Final/Supplement/COSMIC_codon_count_LR_thresholds_by_data_type.png",
       supp_fig3, width = 4, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```
